nodes.name: Verify HMAC Signature
nodes.notes: Verifies HMAC-SHA256 signature from GoWater. Skips verification in dev mode (no secret configured). Throws error on invalid signature to halt the pipeline.

nodes.name: Build Thread Body
nodes.notes: Builds the request body from check-in data and Slack response for saving the thread TS

nodes.name: Save Thread TS
nodes.notes: Saves Slack message ts to attendance record so break/checkout can thread under check-in

nodes.name: Slack: Check Out
nodes.notes: Posts checkout message to Slack with thread_ts for threading under check-in

nodes.name: Format Break Start
nodes.notes: Formats break start message and builds Slack API payload with thread_ts

nodes.name: Post Break Start
nodes.notes: Posts break start to Slack with thread_ts for threading

nodes.name: Format Break End
nodes.notes: Formats break end message and builds Slack API payload with thread_ts

nodes.name: Post Break End
nodes.notes: Posts break end to Slack with thread_ts for threading

nodes.name: Valid Attendance Event?
nodes.notes: Rejects non-attendance events early to prevent unexpected data in the pipeline

nodes.name: Daily 8 AM PHT
nodes.notes: Fires at 00:00 UTC = 8:00 AM PHT to post daily divider
